title: NRL control plane audit JSONL line v1
description: One object per line in build/control/control_audit.jsonl (native nrl control / nrl chat).

ts_utc.description: UTC timestamp (ISO-8601-like, Z suffix from CLI).

channel.description: Dispatch surface that handled the message.

govern.description: Govern verdict id (e.g. allow_advisory, allow_write, deny_trading_sandbox).

raw.description: User text after minimal JSON escaping (quotes/backslashes/newlines sanitized).
